delegations.task_goal: Implement the GH-110 / #95 evidence, site skill source, Browser session reference, and vertical smoke batch for #110-#113 in the renderer using fixtures only.
read_scope: Existing smoke script and package scripts
non_goals: credential/cookie/profile/raw evidence/run truth/session truth/package truth persistence
GitHub, PR, commit, push, or Loom carrier writes
delegations.validation_expectation: Run npm run typecheck, npm run smoke, npm audit --audit-level=high, and git diff --check before handoff.
delegations.output_format: Short report with changed files, validation commands/results, boundary confirmation, and residual risks.
delegations.integration_target: Main controller integrates renderer diff, records build evidence, updates GH-110 recovery/status carriers, and creates the single GH-110 implementation PR.
delegations.integration_summary: Integrated evidence cards, owner viewer refs, Lode capability package attribution, Harbor Browser session/provider facts, and vertical read-only smoke coverage.

integrated_outputs.summary: Added #95 right context evidence cards, Lode package source attribution, Harbor Browser session/provider references, and smoke assertions for the read-only vertical demo path.

validation.summary: Global suite validate/carrier validate passed, but loom build could not consume repo-local tools/loom.py suite JSON surface. No repo-local Loom shim was added.

notes: Admission created via loom_flow.py work-item create --activate --init-recovery.
fact_chain.mode required the same minimal repair used for GH-101/GH-105: set mode to work-item + recovery-entry + derived status-surface while keeping GH-110 entry_points unchanged.
Implementation remains fixture/API-shaped and does not add production Core/Harbor/Lode calls or Stage 5 behavior.
